occupation: Research & Insights Manager at Bauer Media Outdoor UK
headline: Research & Insights Manager at Bauer Media Outdoor UK
summary: I am a curious individual who's passionate about finding the why behind consumer behaviour. inclusive planning is something I am keen to implement in my day to day work as brands and media continue seeking innovative ways to reach consumers.

experiences.title: Interim Marketing Assistant
experiences.description: •	Assist in developing business plan with responsibility for preparing market research of the domiciliary care sector locally and nationally and local competitor analysis. •	Setting up and running social media campaigns. •	Assist in preparing for networking events and local business fairs and supporting the business development initiatives. •	Providing general business admin support to the management team.

experiences.title: Sales Assistant
experiences.description: •	Help customers find the perfect products for them. •	Give fast and friendly service at all times. •	Keep shop floor tidy and organised.

experiences.title: Internship
experiences.description: Youth and Children´s work: My main role was to assist young people and children in their personal growth as they journey through school life, as well as keeping them entertained on a weekly basis. This involved running a club night on a Friday evening and engaging with teenagers during their bible study on Tuesday evenings and Sunday mornings. I would also attend meetings which involved planning events/ managing accounts and attend youth-work networking events.

experiences.title: Intern
experiences.description: •	Meeting with suppliers to check on stock. •	Dealt with incoming and outgoing orders. •	Updated accounts on a daily basis. •	Sent various emails out to regular clients and suppliers. •	Regularly shadowing the Managing Director to gain insight in   what goes into running a business.

education.description: Second year modules include: Accounting & Finance/Business in Society/Entrpreneurship/Consumer Behaviour/Leadership and Management/E-Marketing First year modules include: Economics/People in Organisations/Accounting/Marketing/Developing Graduate Skills/Management Science
education.activities_and_societies: Activities and Societies: President of WWE Appreciation Society. Member of Student Union committee.

accomplishment_publications.name: Fortnite 101
accomplishment_publications.description: Fortnite was the biggest game of 2018. This cultural phenomenon can not only give us an indication about how gaming media is becoming more and more mainstream, how it's core audience interacts with said media and the rise of eSports.

accomplishment_publications.name: Why you should care about Love Island
accomplishment_publications.description: The hit series "Love Island" can teach us a lot about teenagers (Gen Z) such as how they consume TV media and the issues that are important to them

volunteer_work.title: Student Helper
volunteer_work.description: Volunteered as part of the university's "welcome crew" helping new students move into their accomodation, giving them sound advice and being a friendly face.

volunteer_work.title: Student Leader
volunteer_work.description: Entertained young people between the ages of 11-18 on a weekly basis whilst also being a role model to them.
